PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 5/7/02 TO KENNETH R. WACHTEL, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00, IS SCHEDULED TODAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS GRANTED, SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. Notice Of Moiton And Motion For Relief From Order Of Sanctions (No Pos Was Attached)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Relief from Sanctions issued on 5/7/02 to Kenneth R. Wachtel, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted, sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR#11055. (212)
